## Summary

Describe the user-visible or developer-visible change.

## Release Impact

- Type: feat | fix | chore | docs | refactor | test | perf | build | ci | style | revert | deps
- Packages touched: opencloning | opencloning-db | opencloning-cli | non-releasable only
- Breaking change: yes | no

## Notes

- If this PR changes multiple releasable packages with different release semantics, split it before merge.
- Use a Conventional Commits PR title because squash merges become the release-please input.
